title: Otis and the Missing Robot Parts
synopsis: When robot parts go missing from the school science lab, young detective Otis teams up with his diverse group of friends to solve the mystery using observation skills and teamwork.

pages.text: Otis loved science class. He had curly brown hair and always wore his lucky blue glasses. Today, Mrs. Chen had a big surprise. "We're building robots!" she said with a smile. The whole class cheered. Otis bounced in his seat. This was going to be the best day ever!

illustration.description: A bright classroom scene with Otis, a cheerful boy with curly brown hair and blue glasses, sitting at a desk with his hand raised excitedly. Mrs. Chen, an Asian teacher with kind eyes and a warm smile, stands at the front pointing to a whiteboard with robot drawings. Other diverse children are visible in the background, all looking excited.
illustration.alt: Otis and his classmates in science class learning about robots

pages.text: Mrs. Chen opened a big box. Inside were shiny metal parts, colorful wires, and tiny motors. "Each team gets these parts to build your robot," she explained. Otis's team had three people. There was Maya with her bright red braids, and Sam who used a wheelchair and loved to invent things.

illustration.description: Mrs. Chen opening a large cardboard box filled with gleaming robot parts - silver gears, rainbow-colored wires, small motors, and circuit boards. Maya, a girl with vibrant red braids and freckles, and Sam, a boy in a wheelchair with dark skin and an inventor's curious expression, gather around with Otis to look at the parts.
illustration.alt: The teacher showing robot parts to Otis, Maya, and Sam

pages.text: But when they looked in their box, something was wrong. "Hey!" said Maya. "Where are our wheels?" Sam checked his list. "We're missing motors too," he said. Otis put on his thinking face. "This is strange. Very, very strange." Other teams were missing parts as well. Who took them?

illustration.description: The three children looking puzzled as they peer into an almost empty box. Maya has a confused expression with her hands on her hips, Sam is holding a checklist and looking concerned, and Otis has his finger to his chin in a classic thinking pose. The box shows only a few scattered parts instead of the full set they should have.
illustration.alt: Otis, Maya, and Sam discovering their missing robot parts

pages.text: "We need to solve this mystery!" Otis declared. He pulled out his notebook and pencil. "Let's look for clues." Maya found something shiny on the floor. "Look! A wheel!" Sam spotted tiny screws near the door. "The thief dropped these!" They followed the trail like real detectives.

illustration.description: Otis crouched down with a magnifying glass and notebook, examining the floor like a detective. Maya is pointing excitedly at a small silver wheel, and Sam is picking up tiny screws near the classroom door. The scene has a detective mystery mood with dramatic lighting highlighting the clues on the colorful classroom floor.
illustration.alt: The three friends searching for clues about the missing robot parts

pages.text: The trail led to the hallway. Then to the library. Then to the gym! "This is like a treasure hunt," giggled Maya. In the gym, they met Mr. Rodriguez, the PE teacher. "Have you seen anyone with robot parts?" asked Otis politely. Mr. Rodriguez scratched his head. "Hmm, I did hear some beeping sounds from the closet."

illustration.description: The three children in a bright school gymnasium talking to Mr. Rodriguez, a friendly Latino PE teacher with a mustache wearing a track suit. The gym has basketball hoops, colorful mats, and equipment in the background. The children look curious and excited, while Mr. Rodriguez has a thoughtful expression with his hand on his chin.
illustration.alt: Otis, Maya, and Sam talking to Mr. Rodriguez in the gym

pages.text: They crept toward the closet. Beep! Beep! Whirr! Strange sounds came from inside. "What could it be?" whispered Sam. Otis took a deep breath. "Only one way to find out!" He slowly opened the door. Inside was the biggest surprise of all. It wasn't a person who took the parts!

illustration.description: The three children tiptoeing toward a partially open gym closet door, with mysterious blue and green lights glowing from inside. Their faces show a mix of excitement and nervousness. Otis has his hand on the door handle, Maya is peeking over his shoulder, and Sam is positioned nearby in his wheelchair. Sound effect words 'BEEP!' and 'WHIRR!' appear in the air.
illustration.alt: The friends approaching the mysterious gym closet with glowing lights and sounds

pages.text: Inside the closet was a small robot! It had collected all the missing parts in a neat pile. The robot's eyes blinked happily. "Beep beep!" it said. "Oh my!" laughed a voice behind them. It was Principal Washington. "I forgot I left my demonstration robot here. It's programmed to collect metal parts!"

illustration.description: A cute, small robot with big glowing blue eyes sitting in the gym closet surrounded by neat piles of robot parts - wheels, motors, and wires. The robot has a friendly, innocent expression. Behind the children stands Principal Washington, a tall African American woman with natural hair and a kind smile, wearing a professional outfit and looking amused.
illustration.alt: The friendly robot in the closet with all the missing parts and Principal Washington

pages.text: "The robot was just doing its job," explained Principal Washington. "But we need these parts for class!" The robot beeped sadly. It didn't want to cause trouble. Otis had an idea. "What if the robot helps us build our projects?" he suggested. "It knows all about robot parts!" Everyone thought this was perfect.

illustration.description: Otis with his hands raised excitedly sharing his idea, while the small robot looks up hopefully with big expressive eyes. Principal Washington and the other children are gathered around, all smiling at the solution. The robot parts are scattered around them, and everyone looks happy and excited about working together.
illustration.alt: Otis suggesting the robot help with their science project

pages.text: Back in science class, the little robot helped everyone. It sorted parts, held wires, and even sang beeping songs! Mrs. Chen was amazed. "You solved the mystery AND found us a helper!" she said. Otis, Maya, and Sam felt proud. Their robot project was the best one yet. Mystery solved!

illustration.description: A joyful classroom scene with the helpful robot in the center, organizing parts and assisting students. Children of various backgrounds are working on their robot projects with big smiles. Mrs. Chen is clapping happily, and Otis, Maya, and Sam are beaming with pride in the foreground. Completed robot projects are visible on the desks, and everyone looks delighted.
illustration.alt: The whole class happily building robots with help from their new robot friend

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What was missing from the robot-building boxes?
questions.explanation: Maya noticed the wheels were missing, and Sam found that motors were missing too from their robot-building kit.

questions.question: Where did the children find the missing robot parts?
questions.explanation: After following clues through the school, they found all the parts in the gym closet where the robot had collected them.

questions.question: Who really took the robot parts?
questions.explanation: The culprit was Principal Washington's demonstration robot, which was programmed to collect metal parts.

questions.question: How did Otis, Maya, and Sam solve the problem?
choices: They asked the robot to help them
questions.explanation: Otis had the idea to ask the robot to help them with their projects since it knew all about robot parts.

questions.question: What did the robot do to help the class?
choices: It sorted parts and held wires
questions.explanation: The robot helped by sorting parts, holding wires, and even singing beeping songs while the students worked on their projects.

pages.title: Complete the Detective Story
pages.instructions: Fill in the missing words to complete Otis's mystery!
pages.text: Otis put on his _(1)_ glasses and looked for clues. Maya found a shiny _(2)_ on the floor. They followed the trail to the _(3)_ where strange sounds were coming from the closet. Inside was a small _(4)_ that had collected all the missing parts!

pages.title: Science Lab Word Fun
pages.instructions: Help Otis organize the science words!
pages.text: In science class, we use many special things. We need _(1)_ to connect parts together. The _(2)_ make our robots move around. Mrs. _(3)_ teaches us about building robots. When we work as a _(4)_, we can solve any mystery!
